questions.question: Paul says people will accumulate teachers to suit their own what?
questions.feedback: People will gather teachers to suit their own desires, turning away from truth.

questions.question: What metaphor does Paul use to describe his life nearing its end?
options: Being poured out as a drink offering
questions.correct: Being poured out as a drink offering
questions.feedback: Paul says he is already being poured out as a drink offering; the time of his departure has come.

questions.question: Paul says he has fought the good fight and finished the race.
questions.feedback: Paul declares he has fought the good fight, finished the race, and kept the faith.

questions.question: Paul says a crown of _____ is laid up for him, which the Lord will award on that day.
questions.feedback: A crown of righteousness awaits Paul and all who have loved Christ's appearing.

questions.question: Paul says _____ deserted him because he was in love with the present world.
questions.feedback: Demas deserted Paul, having loved this present world.
